title: Veterinarians
description: Diagnose, treat, or research diseases and injuries of animals. Includes veterinarians who conduct research and development, inspect livestock, or care for pets and companion animals.

tasks.text: Treat sick or injured animals by prescribing medication, setting bones, dressing wounds, or performing surgery.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inoculate animals against various diseases, such as rabies or distemper.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Examine animals to detect and determine the nature of diseases or injuries.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collect body tissue, feces, blood, urine, or other body fluids for examination and analysis.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate diagnostic equipment, such as radiographic or ultrasound equipment, and interpret the resulting images.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Educate the public about diseases that can be spread from animals to humans.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Counsel clients about the deaths of their pets or about euthanasia decisions for their pets.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Advise animal owners regarding sanitary measures, feeding, general care, medical conditions, or treatment options.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Euthanize animals.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Attend lectures, conferences, or continuing education courses.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Train or supervise workers who handle or care for animals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform administrative or business management tasks, such as scheduling appointments, accepting payments from clients, budgeting, or maintaining business records.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan or execute animal nutrition or reproduction programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct postmortem studies and analyses to determine the causes of animals' deaths.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Specialize in a particular type of treatment, such as dentistry, pathology, nutrition, surgery, microbiology, or internal medicine.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct the overall operations of animal hospitals, clinics, or mobile services to farms.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect and test horses, sheep, poultry, or other animals to detect the presence of communicable diseases.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Establish or conduct quarantine or testing procedures that prevent the spread of diseases to other animals or to humans and that comply with applicable government regulations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Research diseases to which animals could be susceptible.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide care to a wide range of animals or specialize in a particular species, such as horses or exotic birds.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Determine the effects of drug therapies, antibiotics, or new surgical techniques by testing them on animals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
